mapper.sql: id, article_name, article_outline, story_background, image_desc, article_type, article_characteristics, article_content, voice_tone, voice_link, voice_file_path, video_link, video_file_path, publish_status, content_generated, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM article WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article WHERE article_name = #{articleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1
SELECT article_name FROM article WHERE article_type = #{articleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM article WHERE (content_generated IS NULL OR content_generated = 0) AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC
